message: 🌱 Add kubeflow: User None is not authorized to list ... for namespace: mission (#631)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubeflow-4731-user-none-is-not-authorized-to-list-for-namespace-anonymous",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubeflow: User None is not authorized to list ... for namespace: anonymous",
+    "description": "User None is not authorized to list ... for namespace: anonymous. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kubeflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kubeflow deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubeflow configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubeflow configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow\nkubectl get configmap -n kubeflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubeflow\n```\n**What steps did you take and what happened:**\nInstalled kubeflow 1.0."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for User None is not authorized to list ... for namespace:",
+        "description": "The logs from the jupyter-web-app:\n```\n\"GET /api/namespaces/anonymous/notebooks HTTP/1.1\" 200 -\n2020-02-05 00:42:38,949 | kubeflow_jupyter.common.auth | WARNING | No user credentials were found! Make sure you have correctly set the USERID_HEADER in the Jupyter Web App's deployment.\n```\nThe\n```yaml\n\"GET /api/namespaces/anonymous/notebooks HTTP/1.1\" 200 -\n2020-02-05 00:42:38,949 | kubeflow_jupyter.common.auth | WARNING | No user credentials were found! Make sure you have correctly set the USERID_HEADER in the Jupyter Web App's deployment.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm User None is not authorized to list ... for is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubeflow -n kubeflow --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kubeflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The logs from the jupyter-web-app:\n```\n\"GET /api/namespaces/anonymous/notebooks HTTP/1.1\" 200 -\n2020-02-05 00:42:38,949 | kubeflow_jupyter.common.auth | WARNING | No user credentials were found! Make sure you have correctly set the USERID_HEADER in the Jupyter Web App's deployment.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "\"GET /api/namespaces/anonymous/notebooks HTTP/1.1\" 200 -\n2020-02-05 00:42:38,949 | kubeflow_jupyter.common.auth | WARNING | No user credentials were found! Make sure you have correctly set the USERID_HEADER in the Jupyter Web App's deployment.",
+        "apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3\nkind: EnvoyFilter\nmetadata:\n  name: no-auth-filter\nspec:\n  workloadLabels:\n    istio: ingressgateway\n  filters:\n  - filterConfig:\n      inlineCode: |\n        function envoy_on_response(response_handle)\n          response_handle:headers():add(\"userid_header\", \"kubeflow-userid\")\n          response_handle:headers():add(\"kubeflow-userid\", \"anonymous\")\n        end\n    filterName: envoy.lua\n    filterType: HTTP\n    insertPosition:\n      index: FIRST\n    listenerMatch:\n      listenerType: GATEWAY",
+        "> GET /_/jupyter HTTP/1.1\n.\n.\n< HTTP/1.1 200 OK\n.\n.\n< userid_header: kubeflow-userid\n< kubeflow-userid: anonymous\n.\n."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubeflow",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubeflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Persistentvolumeclaim"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow/issues/4731",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubeflow/kubeflow"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 50,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubeflow installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:24:54.178Z",
